import React from'react';import{Link,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{Camera,MessageCircle,Users,User,Settings,LogOut}from'lucide-react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Navbar(){const{user,logout}=useAuth();const location=useLocation();if(!user)return null;if(location.pathname==='/login'||location.pathname==='/register')return null;if(location.pathname==='/video')return null;// Full screen for video chat
const navItems=[{path:'/discover',icon:Users,label:'Discover'},{path:'/video',icon:Camera,label:'Video'},{path:'/chat',icon:MessageCircle,label:'Chat'},{path:'/profile',icon:User,label:'Profile'},{path:'/settings',icon:Settings,label:'Settings'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/discover",className:"nav-logo",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Camera,{size:24}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"MeetLive"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-links",children:[navItems.map(item=>{const Icon=item.icon;const isActive=location.pathname===item.path;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:item.path,className:`nav-link ${isActive?'active':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Icon,{size:20}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:item.label})]},item.path);}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"nav-link logout-btn",onClick:logout,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LogOut,{size:20}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Logout"})]})]})]});}
